name: knowledge-transfer
description: AI-powered project handover for Claude Code and Codex: export a short onboarding doc plus privacy-filtered project memories into the repo, then verify and import them for the next developer.

interface.shortDescription: Project handover with verified AI memories
interface.longDescription: Export a short onboarding document plus privacy-filtered project memories into a handover package committed to the repo. Import verifies each memory against current code before the next developer's AI learns it.
defaultPrompt: Use $knowledge-transfer to export a handover package.
Use $knowledge-transfer to import verified project memories.
